languagePrompt.title: Choose Your Language

landing.heroTitle: Trusted auto advice — in your language
landing.heroSubtitle: Before you pay, sign, or agree — ask Asaad. Get honest guidance on repairs, dealerships, and car purchases.
landing.trustBadge: Trusted by drivers who refuse to be overcharged
landing.feature1Desc: Upload a repair estimate. We'll tell you what's necessary, what's an upsell, and if the price is fair.
landing.feature2Desc: Stuck at a shop or dealership? Chat, call, or video with Asaad — in English, Spanish, or Arabic.
landing.feature3Desc: Is this a good deal? Spot dealer red flags. Understand financing before you sign.
landing.feature4Desc: Short guides on scams, repair myths, and dealer tricks — written for real people.
landing.ctaSectionTitle: Don't pay until you ask Asaad
landing.ctaSectionDesc: One bad repair or dealer deal can cost thousands. A few minutes with Asaad can save you real money.

quote.title: Quote Review

quote.verdictLow: This price seems low — verify quality.

ask.chatDesc: Text with Asaad right now. Best for quick questions.

carBuying.title: Car Buying Assistant
carBuying.subtitle: Is this a good deal? Let's find out before you sign.
carBuying.estimatedMarketValue: Estimated market value for this vehicle
carBuying.fillAllFields: Please fill in make, model, year, mileage, condition, and price.
carBuying.redFlag3: Refusal to let you take the car to your mechanic
carBuying.redFlag5: Monthly payment focus instead of total price
carBuying.financingDesc: The dealer makes money on the loan, not just the car. Always compare their rate with your bank or credit union.
carBuying.dealGood: This looks like a fair deal.
carBuying.dealBad: This price is above market. Negotiate or walk.
carBuying.dealUnclear: Need more info. Upload the offer sheet.

chat.subtitle: Your ongoing conversation
chat.welcome: Hi! I'm Asaad. What's going on with your car?
chat.emptyState: No messages yet. Ask anything about repairs, dealers, or buying a car.

library.title: Knowledge Library
library.subtitle: Short, honest guides to protect your wallet.

scam1.title: The 'Free Inspection' Trap
scam1.summary: Shops offer free inspections, then find $800 in 'urgent' repairs. Here's how to spot it.

scam2.title: Fake OEM Parts
scam2.summary: You're charged for original parts but get cheap aftermarket. Ask to see the packaging.

scam3.title: The Brake Fluid Scam
scam3.summary: Brake fluid flushes are pushed every visit. Most cars need it every 3–5 years, not every oil change.

myth1.title: You Must Change Oil Every 3,000 Miles
myth1.summary: Modern cars often go 5,000–10,000 miles. Check your owner's manual, not the sticker.

myth2.title: Premium Gas Is Always Better
myth2.summary: Unless your car requires it, premium gas won't help. Save your money.

myth3.title: Warm Up Your Car Before Driving
myth3.summary: Modern engines don't need long warm-ups. 30 seconds is enough in cold weather.

dealer1.title: The Payment Pack
dealer1.summary: Dealers focus on monthly payment to hide the total price. Always negotiate the out-the-door price.

dealer2.title: Add-Ons in the Finance Office
dealer2.summary: GAP insurance, paint protection, extended warranties — most are overpriced. Research before you buy.

dealer3.title: Trade-In Lowball
dealer3.summary: Get your trade-in value from CarMax or online tools before stepping on the lot.

payments.title: Simple, Clear Pricing
payments.subtitle: No hidden fees. Pay only for what you need.
payments.payPerUseDesc: Perfect for one-time questions or a single quote review.
payments.subscriptionDesc: Unlimited access for families who want Asaad always available.
payments.currencyNote: All prices in USD. Billed clearly in your selected language.
